infinity-rework.title: Infinity Rework
infinity-rework.allow_mending.tooltip:
§aON§r - Bows can be enchanted with both Infinity and Mending

§cOFF§r - Bows can only be enchanted with Infinity or Mending
infinity-rework.all_arrows.tooltip:
§aON§r - Infinity will work with all types of arrows (including spectral, tipped and modded)

§cOFF§r - Infinity will only work with regular vanilla arrows

§c§l§nREQUIRES RESTART§r

§aON§r - Infinity chance scales per level

§cOFF§r - Infinity chance is manually set per level
